util Directory Reference(3) Library Functions Manual util Directory Reference(3)

NAME

util Directory Reference

SYNOPSIS

Files


file aspect_ratio.c
📐 Terminal cell aspect ratio calculations for accurate image dimension scaling file display.c
Display width and centering utilities implementation. file env.c
Environment variable utilities with stack-based prompt responses. file format.c
📊 Byte size formatting utilities for human-readable output (B, KB, MB, GB, TB, PB, EB) file fps.c
⏱️ FPS tracking utility implementation (nanosecond-precision) file image.c
🖼️ Safe overflow-checked buffer size calculations for images and video frames file ip.c
🌍 IPv4/IPv6 address parsing, validation, and formatting utilities file parsing.c
🔍 Safe string parsing utilities for integers, sizes, and protocol messages file password.c
🔑 Password prompting utilities with secure input and formatting file path.c
Cross-platform path manipulation with normalization and Windows/Unix separator handling. file pcre2.c
Centralized PCRE2 singleton pattern for efficient regex compilation. file string.c
🔤 String manipulation utilities: ASCII escaping, trimming, case conversion, and formatting file time.c
⏱️ High-precision timing utilities implementation file url.c
Production-grade URL parsing and validation using PCRE2. file utf8.c
🔤 UTF-8 encoding and decoding with multi-byte character support

Version 0.9.19 ascii-chat
